name: Crawfish or Shrimp Cocktail
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the chili sauce and lemon or lime juice.
2. Add catsup, horseradish, Worcestershire sauce, and hot sauce to the mixture.
3. Stir in parsley and salt until well blended.
4. Pour the sauce over crawfish or shrimp.
5. Alternatively, dip crawfish or shrimp directly into the prepared sauce.
